case_title: BETTY STRUCK VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRUCK, BETTY SERVED SEP-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST DATA BANK, A MISSOURI CORPORATION

JOINT STIPULATION TO WITHDRAW SPECIAL MTN TO STRIKE UNDER TO ANTI-SLAPP STATUE AND TO DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT FIRST DATABANK ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRUCK, BETTY
